ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movements" (
  "movement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movement */,
  "exit_destination_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the destination of the movement */,
  "population_type" TEXT /* Type of population involved (e.g., all_persons, adults, children) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the movement period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the movement period */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the question asked to gather this data */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the destination (e.g., Permanent Destinations, Temporary Destinations) */,
  "household_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of household (e.g., without_children, with_children_and_adults) */,
  "total" INTEGER /* Total number of individuals or households that moved */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of specific movements */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the HOPWA program associated with the movement */,
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific household involved */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific individual involved */,
  "movement_type" TEXT /* Type of movement (e.g., temporary to permanent, project to project) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the movement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the movement record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the movement record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movements_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES destination_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movements_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movements_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movements_household_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_id") REFERENCES households ("household_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movements_household_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_type_id") REFERENCES household_types ("household_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movements_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movements_exit_destination_id FOREIGN KEY ("exit_destination_id") REFERENCES exit_destinations ("exit_destination_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exit_destinations" (
  "exit_destination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exit destination */,
  "destination_name" TEXT /* Name of the destination (e.g., Moved from one HOPWA funded project to HOPWA PH, Owned by client, no ongoing subsidy) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the destination */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the destination */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the destination */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the destination */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the destination */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the destination */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person at the destination */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the destination record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the destination record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exit_destination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exit_destinations_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exit_destinations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question asked */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of question (e.g., multiple choice, open-ended) */,
  "options" TEXT /* Possible options for multiple choice questions */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the question record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the question record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "destination_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each destination category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the destination category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the destination category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the category record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the category record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_destination_categories_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_destination_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES destination_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_destination_categories_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "household_types" (
  "household_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household type */,
  "household_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the household type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the household type */,
  "parent_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent type (for hierarchical household types) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the household type record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the household type record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("household_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_household_types_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_household_types_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_household_types_parent_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_type_id") REFERENCES household_types ("household_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for user login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user login */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, manager) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "households" (
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household */,
  "household_name" TEXT /* Name of the household */,
  "household_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of household */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the household */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the household */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the household */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the household */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the household record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the household record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("household_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_households_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_households_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
